title: 3M Bair Hugger 775 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the 3M Bair Hugger 775 Series patient warming system, including filter inspection, temperature calibration, over-temperature testing, electrical safety documentation, and CMMS copy text.
interval: Operating temperature calibration and over-temperature detection system test every 6 months or 500 hours of use; air filter replacement every 12 months or 500 hours of use.

title: Cardinal Health Kendall SCD 700 Series - Preventive Maintenance Procedure
description: Preventive maintenance procedure for the Cardinal Health Kendall SCD 700 Series sequential compression device controller, including filter inspection, Basic Functional Test, battery check, and electrical safety documentation.
